creator: dereckson@gmail.com
text:
Checked with fungi from OpenDev (the new project spin off OpenStack Infra). 

So https://docs.opendev.org/opendev/git-review/latest/ lets the impression we're still under 2.1.0, but a 2.2.0 *has* been released, for example on PyPI.

https://pypi.org/project/git-review/2.2.0/

So the easiest move is to update the port to 2.2.0.
